messages.content:
Revise the following technical sentence so that it matches my EPON paper wording while preserving the original meaning:

EPON is a very good option for multimedia services because fiber offers a lot of bandwidth.
Ethernet Passive Optical Network (EPON) is regarded as one of the best solutions for serving diverse multimedia services because of the large amount of bandwidth available in a single fiber.

Paraphrase this sentence in my formal EPON research style:

Good playback continuity means the user can watch without freezing or blur.
High playback continuity enables the user to view the channel without distortion, such as freezing and blurred video.

Rewrite the following passage in a concise EPON journal style. Preserve the technical meaning and improve the academic phrasing:

If playout lag is low, the stream feels more live to the user.
Low playout lag means that the channel is live more often to the user.

Paraphrase this sentence in my formal EPON research style:

Because the swarm is formed by peers themselves, network conditions like delay and throughput strongly affect QoS.

The peer swarm formed to retrieve video chunks is determined by the individual peers; therefore, the jitter, delay, and throughput on the network path have a direct impact on the user quality of service.

Rewrite the following in my academic EPON paper style. Avoid generic or business phrases and focus on technical clarity:

Another method can detect and locate faults centrally, but it still needs a protection mechanism to keep the ONU connected.

In contrast, the centralized approach can detect, localize and measure fiber faults; however, the network operators need to provide a protection mechanism to maintain the connection between the OLT and the affected ONU.

Rewrite the following in my academic EPON paper style. Avoid generic or business phrases and focus on technical clarity:

The neighboring ONU then forwards the affected ONU traffic to the OLT.
Afterward, this neighbor ONU handles all of the packets originating from the affected ONU and sends them to the OLT.

Paraphrase this sentence in my formal EPON research style:

This method can detect degradation, but if the drop fiber is cut, the ONU can no longer talk to the central office.
This approach is adequate for identifying any link degradation; however, when fiber cut occurs at the DDF, the ONU cannot communicate with the CO or OLT.

Rewrite the following in my academic EPON paper style. Avoid generic or business phrases and focus on technical clarity:

EPON is a very good option for multimedia services because fiber offers a lot of bandwidth.
Ethernet Passive Optical Network (EPON) is regarded as one of the best solutions for serving diverse multimedia services because of the large amount of bandwidth available in a single fiber.

Rewrite the following in my academic EPON paper style. Avoid generic or business phrases and focus on technical clarity:

QoS can be measured using delay, jitter, throughput, and packet loss.
QoS performance can be characterized with several parameters, such as packet delay, jitter, system throughput, and packet loss ratio.

Revise the following technical sentence so that it matches my EPON paper wording while preserving the original meaning:

The ONU can detect signal problems or transceiver faults and then switch to a protection line while notifying the OLT through a neighbor.

In the proposed mechanism, the ONU can automatically detect any signal anomalies in the physical layer or transceiver failure, switching the working line to the protection line and sending the critical event alarm to OLT via its neighbor.

Paraphrase this sentence in my formal EPON research style:

A small startup delay helps users change channels smoothly.
Low startup-delay allows smooth switching between channels.

Rewrite the following in my academic EPON paper style. Avoid generic or business phrases and focus on technical clarity:

Strict-priority scheduling protects high-priority traffic, but lower-priority traffic may starve.
The strict-priority DBA scheduling mechanism can guarantee higher priority traffic; however, some lower priority traffics can suffer starvation.

Revise the following technical sentence so that it matches my EPON paper wording while preserving the original meaning:

Because the swarm is formed by peers themselves, network conditions like delay and throughput strongly affect QoS.

The peer swarm formed to retrieve video chunks is determined by the individual peers; therefore, the jitter, delay, and throughput on the network path have a direct impact on the user quality of service.

Rewrite the following passage in a concise EPON journal style. Preserve the technical meaning and improve the academic phrasing:

In P2P live streaming, users share video data and upload bandwidth with one another.
In P2P live streaming, communication among peers is performed in a distributed manner by contributing resources such as video chunks and bandwidth.

Revise the following technical sentence so that it matches my EPON paper wording while preserving the original meaning:

Peers that exchange chunks together are usually called a swarm.
The set of peers that exchange video chunks forms a swarm.
